data.name: SmartLookup_Description
data.value: A rich hover-preview card for Dataverse lookup fields. Drop on any Lookup column — the chip stays familiar, but hovering reveals the related record's primary fields, image and a one-click "Open record" button. Linear/Notion-grade lookup UX, zero config.

data.name: Value_Description
data.value: The Lookup column to enhance. The control reads the related record's logical name automatically — no extra setup needed.

data.name: PreviewFields_Description
data.value: Optional comma-separated list of attribute logical names (max 6). Highest priority — overrides the Quick View Form and the smart defaults. Leave empty to use the related entity's Quick View Form (recommended). Example: jobtitle,parentcustomerid,emailaddress1,telephone1

data.name: UseQuickViewForm_Description
data.value: When On (recommended), SmartLookup reads the related entity's Quick View Form to decide which fields to show. Admins configure fields by editing the Quick View Form in the standard Power Apps form designer — no per-PCF setup required. When Off, the smart-default field list for the entity is used.

data.name: QuickViewFormName_Description
data.value: Optional. If the related entity has multiple Quick View Forms, type the exact name of the one to use. Leave empty to auto-select "Information" if present, otherwise the first active Quick View Form on the entity.

data.name: AccentColor_Description
data.value: Optional hex colour for the avatar gradient and accent strip (e.g. #0078d4). Defaults to Microsoft blue.

data.name: Position_Description
data.value: Where the preview card appears relative to the lookup chip.

data.name: Position_Auto_Desc
data.value: Picks the side with the most viewport space available.

data.name: Position_Right_Desc
data.value: Always render to the right of the chip.

data.name: ShowOpenButton_Description
data.value: Show a button at the bottom of the preview card to open the related record in a new dialog.

data.name: HoverDelay_Description
data.value: Milliseconds to wait on hover before the preview card appears. Default 250. Set to 0 for instant.
